mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, status, token_version AS tokenVersion FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT id, username, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, status, token_version AS tokenVersion FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.sort_order, r.role_code

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.permission_code

SELECT m.menu_code AS code, m.menu_name AS name, m.route_path AS path, m.icon FROM sys_menu m WHERE m.visible = 1 AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( m.permission_code IS NULL OR m.permission_code IN ( SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' ) ) ORDER BY m.sort_order, m.menu_code
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{userId}
